items.text: We conduct a structured audit of how work moves through your organization across teams, systems, and decision points.
items.normalizedText: We conduct a structured audit of how work moves through your organization across teams, systems, and decision points.

items.text: The goal is to identify where AI can reduce operational overhead, accelerate execution, or replace manual coordination entirely.
items.normalizedText: The goal is to identify where AI can reduce operational overhead, accelerate execution, or replace manual coordination entirely.

items.text: Varick designs and builds the AI agent system that will execute the workflow — integrating it with the enterprise tools, data, and operational logic that power the process. You're kept in the loop the entire time.
items.normalizedText: Varick designs and builds the AI agent system that will execute the workflow — integrating it with the enterprise tools, data, and operational logic that power the process. You're kept in the loop the entire time.

items.text: Varick deploys the AI agent system into the enterprise stack, connecting it to live systems and workflows so it can begin executing operational work in production. Agents are built on top of your existing software, meaning no migrations are required. If you have BAAs with AI Labs we'll use their models, and we deploy on your cloud.
items.normalizedText: Varick deploys the AI agent system into the enterprise stack, connecting it to live systems and workflows so it can begin executing operational work in production. Agents are built on top of your existing software, meaning no migrations are required. If you have BAAs with AI Labs we'll use their models, and we deploy on your cloud.

items.text: After deployment, Varick improves how the agent operates over time - strengthening its decision logic, increasing reliability, and extending it into new operational responsibilities.
items.normalizedText: After deployment, Varick improves how the agent operates over time - strengthening its decision logic, increasing reliability, and extending it into new operational responsibilities.

items.text: AI agents remove manual coordination, approvals, and repetitive operational work across systems.
items.normalizedText: AI agents remove manual coordination, approvals, and repetitive operational work across systems.

items.text: Processes that once required multiple team handoffs can now execute continuously.
items.normalizedText: Processes that once required multiple team handoffs can now execute continuously.

items.text: Operational output increases without adding headcount or new coordination layers.
items.normalizedText: Operational output increases without adding headcount or new coordination layers.

items.text: Agents handle accounts payable, accounts receivable, card reconciliation, runways and forecasting, and more. Close your books in record time without the overhead.
items.normalizedText: Agents handle accounts payable, accounts receivable, card reconciliation, runways and forecasting, and more. Close your books in record time without the overhead.

items.text: Agents manage vendor onboarding, purchasing approvals, contract coordination, and supplier communication. Cut procurement cycle times and stop losing money to off-contract spend.
items.normalizedText: Agents manage vendor onboarding, purchasing approvals, contract coordination, and supplier communication. Cut procurement cycle times and stop losing money to off-contract spend.

items.text: Agents handle CRM hygiene, deal desk approvals, pipeline reporting, and forecast assembly. Keep your sales data clean and your reps selling instead of doing sales operations work.
items.normalizedText: Agents handle CRM hygiene, deal desk approvals, pipeline reporting, and forecast assembly. Keep your sales data clean and your reps selling instead of doing sales operations work.

items.text: Agents track regulatory deadlines, assemble audit documentation, monitor policy adherence, and flag exceptions before they become findings. Stay audit-ready without the manual overhead.
items.normalizedText: Agents track regulatory deadlines, assemble audit documentation, monitor policy adherence, and flag exceptions before they become findings. Stay audit-ready without the manual overhead.

items.text: Varick operates across your existing tools, connecting data, workflows, and systems into a single operational layer. We'll never force you to migrate off your systems, but will help you through the process if you'd like.
items.normalizedText: Varick operates across your existing tools, connecting data, workflows, and systems into a single operational layer. We'll never force you to migrate off your systems, but will help you through the process if you'd like.

items.text: Agents built for your finance department after embedding with your team and mapping how work actually moves across AP, AR, close, treasury, and FP&A. Deployed across your existing ERP, expense, and reporting systems. No migration, no new software.
items.normalizedText: Agents built for your finance department after embedding with your team and mapping how work actually moves across AP, AR, close, treasury, and FP&A. Deployed across your existing ERP, expense, and reporting systems. No migration, no new software.

items.text: Agents built for your sales org after mapping every handoff from lead intake through deal desk, forecasting, comp, and customer handoff. Deployed across your existing CRM, call recording, CLM, and enablement tools.
items.normalizedText: Agents built for your sales org after mapping every handoff from lead intake through deal desk, forecasting, comp, and customer handoff. Deployed across your existing CRM, call recording, CLM, and enablement tools.

items.text: Agents built for your operations team after mapping exception flows, demand planning, procurement, and warehouse coordination. Deployed across your existing ERP, WMS, and planning systems.
items.normalizedText: Agents built for your operations team after mapping exception flows, demand planning, procurement, and warehouse coordination. Deployed across your existing ERP, WMS, and planning systems.

items.text: What happens during the discovery call?
items.normalizedText: What happens during the discovery call?

items.text: The discovery call is a working session where we review how operational workflows currently run inside your organization. From there we identify areas where an AI agent could realistically execute work, what systems it would need to interact with, and what a deployment timeline would look like.
items.normalizedText: The discovery call is a working session where we review how operational workflows currently run inside your organization. From there we identify areas where an AI agent could realistically execute work, what systems it would need to interact with, and what a deployment timeline would look like.

items.text: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent?
items.normalizedText: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent?

items.text: Most deployments move from discovery to a production agent in 6–12 weeks, depending on the complexity of the workflow and the systems involved.
items.normalizedText: Most deployments move from discovery to a production agent in 6–12 weeks, depending on the complexity of the workflow and the systems involved.

items.text: What kinds of tasks can AI agents actually perform?
items.normalizedText: What kinds of tasks can AI agents actually perform?

items.text: Agents typically monitor operational systems, analyze incoming data, trigger actions, route approvals, generate internal reports, and coordinate work across tools that previously required manual oversight.
items.normalizedText: Agents typically monitor operational systems, analyze incoming data, trigger actions, route approvals, generate internal reports, and coordinate work across tools that previously required manual oversight.

items.text: Can agents work with our existing enterprise tools?
items.normalizedText: Can agents work with our existing enterprise tools?

items.text: Yes. Agents integrate with the systems already running your operations — such as ERPs, CRMs, internal databases, and data platforms — through APIs and automation layers.
items.normalizedText: Yes. Agents integrate with the systems already running your operations — such as ERPs, CRMs, internal databases, and data platforms — through APIs and automation layers.

items.text: How much involvement is required from our internal org?
items.normalizedText: How much involvement is required from our internal org?

items.text: Your team provides context on the workflow and systems involved (<20 hours across all employees). Varick handles the design and deployment of the agent system while coordinating with the appropriate technical or operational stakeholders.
items.normalizedText: Your team provides context on the workflow and systems involved (<20 hours across all employees). Varick handles the design and deployment of the agent system while coordinating with the appropriate technical or operational stakeholders.

items.text: How do you ensure security and governance?
items.normalizedText: How do you ensure security and governance?

items.text: Agents operate within existing system permissions and enterprise security policies. Access is controlled through integrations, and all agent actions are logged so activity can be monitored and audited.
items.normalizedText: Agents operate within existing system permissions and enterprise security policies. Access is controlled through integrations, and all agent actions are logged so activity can be monitored and audited.

items.text: Can agents be fully customized for our workflows?
items.normalizedText: Can agents be fully customized for our workflows?

items.text: Yes. Every deployment is designed around the specific workflows, systems, and operational rules inside your organization.
items.normalizedText: Yes. Every deployment is designed around the specific workflows, systems, and operational rules inside your organization.

items.text: Engagements are structured based on the complexity of the workflow, the systems involved, and the scope of the deployment. Pricing is typically discussed after the discovery call once we understand the operational requirements. Tends to be 90% cheaper than your otherwise FTE cost.
items.normalizedText: Engagements are structured based on the complexity of the workflow, the systems involved, and the scope of the deployment. Pricing is typically discussed after the discovery call once we understand the operational requirements. Tends to be 90% cheaper than your otherwise FTE cost.
